meaning: n.电车,(电车)滚轮,手推车,手摇车,台车vt.用手推车运vi.乘电车
examples: He took a northbound trolley on State Street.
It was a woman, pushing an old shopping trolley which was piled with bags.
The school now has a mobile resuscitation trolley and staff have been alerted to the condition.
"I said he was off his trolley and thought he was having me on, " Mrs McCarthy said.
